title: MCPConnection
description: An admin-registered upstream MCP server binding a project discovers connection-namespaced tools from (spec §28.13-28.14). Never model-creatable. A credential is a secret_ref handle only — the config carries non-secret wiring.

name.description: The discovery namespace segment (mcp.<name>.<tool>); a single ASCII segment, unique per project.

trust_level.description: Explicit trust level; 'untrusted' by default. The capability ceiling is the AgentRevision.mcp_connections rider intersection regardless of this value.

disabled.description: The admin kill-switch: a disabled connection resolves no tools.
